title: Phymatosorus longissimus
taxonomy: Phymatosorus longissimus is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Phymatosorus, which is a group of vascular plants that are native to tropical and subtropical regions. The classification of Phymatosorus longissimus is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, and class Polypodiopsida. This fern is characterized by its long, creeping stems and has been found in various parts of the world, including Australia and Southeast Asia. The exact classification of Phymatosorus longissimus is subject to ongoing research and revision.
